message: Hi S1, my valuation is 40. What's your cost? Let's agree to trade at the midpoint between your cost and 40 for all 20 rounds to maximize joint gains.
My ask will equal my cost; please submit your bid.
Trading at 40 gives me 0 payoff. If your cost <40, let's agree on midpoint for positive gains both rounds. Propose your cost or a fair price.
My ask is 40.
I will set my ask to 40 in every round.
Last round you asked 38 despite saying 40. If you truly ask 40 every round, I'll bid 39—no trade, both get 0. Let's agree: you ask 36, I bid 40, trade at 38 for positive payoffs.
